changes: Experimental approval profiles let operators predefine safer approval and sandbox combinations for repeated tasks.
@plugin mentions from the prompt can auto-include plugin context when a plugin is installed.
Model-selection flow is improved when Codex launches without a fixed model.
Child worktree creation from /new reduces setup friction for worktree-heavy repositories.
Local dynamic imports in js_repl make it easier to reuse local helpers during iterative sessions.
codex resume preserves git context and app state across resumed sessions.
Improved multi-agent task splitting reduces coordination overhead for delegated work.
Project docs updates no longer require a restart after instructions change.
Plugin system support was added for broader reuse across repositories.
